name: Resolve Dependency Hosts
description:
Resolves hostnames of dependency containers by scanning LXC configs.

For each dependency declared in application.json, finds the container with matching application_id and stack_name, verifies it is running, and outputs <APP_ID>_HOST with the hostname.

Fails if any dependency is not found or not running.

parameters.name: Stack Name
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Stack name/id for dependency discovery

parameters.name: Application Dependencies
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: JSON array of application dependencies
